name: adr-0017-negative-timestamp
description: ADR-0017's own regression-guard vector: "2026-07-03T14:32:10" is valid ISO-8601 (an offset-less local date-time) but is NOT valid RFC 3339 (RFC 3339 §5.6 requires every date-time to carry a UTC offset, "Z" or "±hh:mm"). A validator in any language that checks only `type: "string"` for `timestamp` and never asserts `format: date-time` will WRONGLY accept this fixture — asserting `format: date-time` (ajv-formats in TypeScript; an explicit FormatChecker in the Phase-3 Python port, since python-jsonschema does not enable format assertion by default) is what this vector exists to force.
